ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department head */,
  "dept_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  "dept_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "dept_website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_dept_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_head_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Reference to the course the section belongs to */,
  "block" INTEGER /* Block number assigned to the section */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room number assigned to the section */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the section */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the section */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the section is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the section is offered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the section (e.g., Open, Closed, Waitlist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Academic rank of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Reference to the course the section belongs to */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the section */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the instructor's assignment to the section */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the instructor's assignment to the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the section */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the section */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days of the week the section meets */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the section */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the section is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)
